title: Future of Verilator Parser?
body:
@wsnyder , I've recently been made aware of https://github.com/antmicro/verilator that uses Surelog as a parser frontend.
I was wondering how much of this effort is coordinated with you.
Do you see this effort replacing the current parser?
Do you know if it solves existing problems in the Verilator parsing and elaboration phases, such as recursive functions and modules, and elaboration of false generate/endgenerate paths?
